seoTitle: Nombi vs Noorong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nombi and Noorong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nombi and Noorong.
heading: Nombi vs Noorong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nombi, New South Wales and Noorong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nombi has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Noorong (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nombi or Noorong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nombi has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Noorong scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nombi scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Noorong scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nombi or Noorong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nombi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
